import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ''scripts'')
from generate_resume import generate_resume

# Professional Summary
professional_summary = ''''''Finance graduate with hands-on M&A execution experience across 7 live mandates in healthcare, technology, and life sciences sectors. Demonstrated commercial aptitude through entrepreneurial ventures (Screeny.ai, luxury business) and strong analytical skills (Python, data analysis). Proven resilience in high-stakes deal environments managing multiple concurrent transactions. Eager to apply data analysis capabilities and individual responsibility to Glencore''s dynamic trading environment.''''''

# Auraïa bullets (3)
auraia_bullets = [
    ''Managed end-to-end execution on 7 concurrent mandates (EUR 5M–50M) across healthcare, technology, and life sciences sectors, handling valuation, buyer sourcing, and deal coordination under tight deadlines in a lean 3-person team'',
    ''Built financial models (LBO, DCF, comps) and performed data analysis to identify strategic buyers across Europe, US, and Asia, coordinating logistical and financial execution from marketing materials to closing'',
    ''Sole analyst entrusted with individual responsibility for data room management, client presentations, and relationship coordination with advisors across multiple live transactions simultaneously''
]

# RC Group bullet (1)
rc_group_bullet = ''Worked directly with CEO on acquisition targets in France and Belgium, preparing investment memos with market analysis and financial projections (EUR 10M–30M targets), demonstrating commercial aptitude in evaluating strategic opportunities''

# Europ Assistance bullet (1)
europ_assistance_bullet = ''Built automated financial dashboards (Excel, PowerBI) for CHF 50M+ subsidiary, performing data analysis on monthly P&L variance and developing cost allocation models with accuracy critical for Board presentations''

# Leadership bullets (3)
leadership_bullets = [
    ''Founded and developed Screeny.ai, an AI-driven buyer sourcing tool for investment banks, leading full-stack development and sales outreach; tool adopted by 3 firms, reducing buyer research time by ~90% (10h+ to 20min)'',
    ''Led post-COVID financial recovery for AIESEC by sourcing corporate leads and negotiating partnerships; closed 3 deals generating CHF 60K annual revenue through resilience and strong communication skills'',
    ''Manage personal investment portfolio using options strategies (Cash Secured Puts, Covered Calls), executing disciplined trades with 45-day expiries to generate CHF 5K+ annual premiums while managing risk''
]

# Courses (4)
courses = ''Data Science for Finance, Derivatives, Corporate Governance and M&A, Quantitative Asset and Risk Management''

# Skills (one line)
skills = ''Excel, Bloomberg Terminal, Python, SQL, PowerBI, Capital IQ''

# Company and position
company = ''Glencore''
position = ''Commercial_Graduate''

# Call generate_resume
folder_name, output_path = generate_resume(
    professional_summary=professional_summary,
    auraia_bullets=auraia_bullets,
    rc_group_bullet=rc_group_bullet,
    europ_assistance_bullet=europ_assistance_bullet,
    leadership_bullets=leadership_bullets,
    courses=courses,
    skills=skills,
    company=company,
    position=position
)

print(f''Resume generated successfully!'')
print(f''Output folder: {folder_name}'')
print(f''Resume path: {output_path}'')
")

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ''scripts'')
from generate_cover_letter import generate_cover_letter

# Company details
company_name = ''bp''
recipient_name = ''Hiring Manager''
street_number = ''Canary Wharf''
postal_city_country = ''London, United Kingdom''

# INTRO PARAGRAPH - Uses Tavily research on innovation + technology
intro_paragraph = ''''''bp''s core values of being innovative and performance-driven, with a commitment to leveraging technology to drive positive change in energy markets, align perfectly with my experience applying AI and Machine Learning to solve real-world business problems. I am writing to express my strong interest in the Supply, Trading & Shipping Analytics Graduate Programme, particularly the opportunity to contribute to your Fundamentals Modelling & Innovation team. With hands-on experience building AI-driven tools that deliver data driven insights and a proven ability to perform in fast-paced environments, I am excited to bring my analytical capabilities and commercial mindset to bp''s trading operations.''''''

# BODY PARAGRAPH 1 - AI/ML Innovation (matches Analytics track''s AI/ML focus)
body_paragraph_1 = ''''''**AI-Driven Innovation & Automation** - What draws me most to bp''s Analytics track is your focus on advancing fundamental modelling capabilities through AI and Machine Learning to increase automation and generate data driven insights. As founder of Screeny.ai, an AI-powered buyer sourcing tool adopted by three M&A firms, I demonstrated the ability to take initiative in applying technology to drive efficiency. I built this platform from scratch, leveraging machine learning algorithms to automate market research and reduce sourcing time by 90% (from 10+ hours to 20 minutes). This experience taught me how to translate complex data into actionable commercial insights, a skill directly applicable to identifying fundamental drivers that influence market prices and supporting front-line trading teams.''''''

# BODY PARAGRAPH 2 - Fast-paced commercial execution
body_paragraph_2 = ''''''**Commercial Execution in Fast-Paced Environments** - At Auraïa Capital Advisory, I developed the performance-driven mindset essential for analytics support in trading. As the sole analyst managing seven concurrent mandates (EUR 5M-50M) in a lean three-person team, I was entrusted with individual responsibility from day one. I built detailed financial models (LBO, DCF, comps) under tight deadlines while analyzing market fundamentals, supply and demand dynamics, and pricing trends across healthcare, technology, and life sciences sectors. This experience showed me how analytical rigor combined with commercial awareness can directly influence decision-making outcomes, similar to how strategists provide actionable insights to maximize trading profits.''''''
